title: Material Synthesis Preparation with CSV Input
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol preps up to (4)...
steps.instruction: This protocol preps up to (4) 24 tube custom tube racks with unique volumes of reagents 1-18 coming from a 15mL tube rack, as well as a 50mL tube rack. CSV's for destination custom racks should all include the following header `Rack, Well, Label, DEAEMA (mL), AEMAm (mL), DIPAEMA (mL), DMAEMA (mL), MPC (mL), PEGMA500 (mL), HEMA (mL), PEGMA300 (mL), PEGMA950 (mL), GlyMA (mL), PHPMA (mL), Initiator (mL), CTA (mL), Initiator 2 (mL), CTA 2 (mL), Solv (mL), Solv2, Solv3`. Headers may include whatever nomenclature is desired, but must have the same number of columns. The initial volumes CSV informs the initial volume of all 15 tubes in slots 2 and 5, and includes the following as the header `Slot (2 or 5), Tube Position (A1, A2, etc.), Initial Volume (mL)`. Note: the initial volume CSV should include 18 rows not including the header - 15 for the 15 tube rack, and 3 for the 50mL rack.

steps.title: Aspirate from A1 of tube rack...
steps.instruction: Aspirate from A1 of tube rack at deck slot 2 at a height that doesnt penetrate the liquid past 75% of the tip length

steps.title: Raise pipette to the top of...
steps.instruction: Raise pipette to the top of the source tube at a rate of 10mm/s and delay 5s

steps.title: Touch tip at a vertical offset...
steps.instruction: Touch tip at a vertical offset of -1mm from the top of the tube

steps.title: Move to A1 at deck slot 3 (custom tube rack)
steps.instruction: Move to A1 at deck slot 3 (custom tube rack)

steps.title: Delay 5s and Blowout at a rate of 5uL/s
steps.instruction: Delay 5s and Blowout at a rate of 5uL/s

steps.title: Repeat Steps 2-7 over destination A2-D6...
steps.instruction: Repeat Steps 2-7 over destination A2-D6 using an array of volumes and flow rates, all using liquid from source location A1

steps.title: Repeat steps 1-9 for each of...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 1-9 for each of the source tubes in the Falcon tube racks at deck slot 2 and deck slot 5

steps.title: Repeat steps 1-11 for all destination...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 1-11 for all destination vial racks at deck slots 7, 8, & 9
